Class Description: A focused, aligned, and incredibly effective full-body workout.Experience the precision and power of Reformer Pilates — without the machine. This class blends the elegance of Reformer sequencing with the accessibility of mat training, making it perfect for all levels.

Class Description: Strengthen Your Core with Care!Diese sanfte, aber wirkungsvolle Prenatal Pilates-Session hilft dir, deinen Körper während der Schwangerschaft zu stärken und gleichzeitig zu entspannen. Mit gezielten Übungen für den Core, sanften Flows und fließenden Übergängen bringst du deinen Kreislauf in Schwung und stärkst deine Muskulatur – alles mit Fokus auf deine Sicherheit und das Wohlbefinden deines Babys. Der Pilatesball und leichte Gewichte unterstützen dich dabei, die Bauchmuskeln zu aktivieren und die Körpermitte zu stabilisieren, während du gleichzeitig den Rücken und den Beckenboden stärkst.Für alle werdenden Mütter, die mit einem sanften Glow und viel Energie durch diese besondere Zeit gehen wollen.

Class Description: Relax to the max!Here you can relieve stress, release tension, and find inner peace. With slow, mindful movements and deep breathing, you will regain your balance and find deep relaxation. The class is designed to gently mobilize your body and release tension while calming your mind.After the movement, you can let go completely with sound healing: the gentle vibrations and harmonious sounds of singing bowls, gongs, and other instruments bring your body and mind into harmony. They release blockages, calm your nervous system, and lead you into deep relaxation. You almost glide into a state of complete calm, where stress is reduced and your body can regenerate.Contraindications for sound meditation: anxiety and panic disorders, epilepsy, pacemakers, psychosis

Class Description: Bring your hormones back into flowDiese Stunde bringt Körper und Hormonsystem in Einklang. Class Title: Yin & Yoga Nidra for Hormone Balance
Class Description: Tauche ein in eine wohltuende Mischung aus Yin Yoga und Yoga Nidra, die dein Hormonsystem sanft unterstützt und Körper und Geist in Balance bringt. In dieser beruhigenden Praxis verweilst du länger in passiven, tiefen Dehnungen, die das fasziale Gewebe öffnen, das Nervensystem beruhigen und energetische Blockaden lösen.Der anschließende Yoga Nidra – der yogische Schlaf – führt dich in einen Zustand tiefer Entspannung, in dem sich Stresshormone regulieren, das Nervensystem harmonisiert und regenerative Prozesse gefördert werden.Dieser Kurs ist ideal für dich, wenn du:hormonelle Dysbalancen ausgleichen möchtestStress, Müdigkeit oder innere Unruhe spürstdeinen Energiehaushalt stabilisieren willstPMS, Zyklusbeschwerden oder Schlafprobleme verbessern möchtestdir eine tiefe, nährende Auszeit gönnen willstDie Kombination aus Yin und Yoga Nidra schenkt dir Ruhe, Erdung und eine bewusstere Verbindung zu deinem weiblichen Zyklus und inneren Rhythmus. Perfekt, um wieder in Harmonie zu kommen – körperlich, emotional und energetisch.

Venue Description: Yoga in Neukölln und Kreuzberg Welcome to yellow yoga! (GER below) We are a “Solidarische Yogagemeinschaft”/ “Community Supported Yoga Project” and you are an important part of it! At the moment, we offer INSTUDIO classes and LIVE drop-in ONLINE classes in both our studios: Studio Sonne (Sonnenallee 67) & Gelber Raum (Mariannenstr. 48). Please note for our IN STUDIO classes: * Arrive at least 15 min before class to have enough time for the check in * You can use our mats/blocs/blankets and don't need to bring your own (but of course you can also use your own) :) Each class is also streamed live via Zoom and you can book them as an ONLINE class. Please note for our ONLINE classes: * You will receive a link to the online class via email 15 minutes before it begins. Please find information about subs and teachers on our website. ------------------------------------------- Willkommen bei yellow yoga! Wir sind eine „Solidarische Yogagemeinschaft“ und du bist ein wichtiger Teil davon! Im Moment bieten wir IN STUDIO Klassen und LIVE Drop-in ONLINE Klassen in beiden Studios an: Studio Sonne (Sonnenallee 67) Gelber Raum (Mariannenstr. 48). Wichtige Infos für unsere IN STUDIO Klassen: * Komme bitte mind. 15 Minuten bevor die Klasse startet ins Studio, um in Ruhe einchecken zu können. * Du kannst unsere Matten/Blöcke/Decken wieder nutzen und must nicht deine eigenen mitbringen (kannst du aber natürlich auch wenn du magst) 😊 Wir streamen alle unsere Klassen auch per Zoom. Um online teilzunehmen kannst du unsere ONLINE Klassen buchen. Wichtige Infos für unsere ONLINE Klassen: * 15 Minuten bevor die Klasse startet erhälst du den Link per Email. Informationen zu Vertretungen und unseren Lehrer*innen findest du auf unserer Homepage.

Class Title: Kundalini IN STUDIO SONNE with Paula (all levels/english)
Class Description: This Kundalini Yoga practice weaves together breathwork, dynamic movement and meditation to cleanse, strengthen and harmonise body and mind. Through focused techniques and uplifting kriyas, the practice supports you in moving beyond perceived limitations and connecting with your inner energy and vitality. Kundalini Yoga is suitable for all levels. For beginners, it's helpful to know that the class may include chanting, specific breathing patterns and repetitive sequences designed to awaken and balance your energetic system. As always, you are encouraged to listen to your body and practice with awareness and respect for your own pace. In the studio, we provide mats and all the props you need to make the most of your practice.

Class Category: Fitness, Pilates, Yoga, Dancing, Massage, Meditation, Wellness, Qi Gong and Tai Chi, Relaxation, Online Course
Class Description: Get ready for a fun and energizing class that will leave you feeling relaxed and powerful! We’ll combine the flowing mindfulness of Yoga with a strength-driven Pilates class that will tone your whole body. Whether you’re a newbie or experienced, I am here to give you guidance and attention. Expect a welcoming, uplifting vibe, some sweet tunes, and a bit of relaxation to finish. Open to all levels.
Venue Description: Yoga in Berlin - Indoor, Outdoor und Online Our mission is to spread yoga and plant trees: we invest 5% of our profits in planting trees in the south of India. Our classes are DONATION BASED. We want to make Yoga accessible to EVERYBODY. We want to support you on your way to find your true self. The one that is behind all the thoughts, behind everything that society told you to be. Our teachers offer a great variety of classes In Studio, Online and Open Air: from energizing vinyasa flow and ecstatic dance to Hatha and Kundalini yoga, meditation, mantra singing, Sound Bath and restorative yin yoga classes.

Class Category: Fitness, Pilates, Yoga, Dancing, Massage, Meditation, Wellness, Qi Gong and Tai Chi, Relaxation, Online Course
Class Description: Around 8-12 weeks after giving birth, you can join Postnatal Yoga, with or without your baby. Through structured sequences, you'll rebuild muscle tone, improve stability, and regain control over your muscles. Focus is on strengthening the pelvic floor, abdomen, and shoulders. A typical class not only supports physical recovery but also provides balance and relaxation amidst your new routine as a mother. If you wish, you can learn how to incorporate your baby into the exercises. This class doesn’t replace a postpartum recovery course led by a midwife!

Class Category: Fitness, Pilates, Yoga, Dancing, Massage, Meditation, Wellness, Qi Gong and Tai Chi, Relaxation, Online Course
Class Description: Your body is designed to move between alertness and rest, but in today’s over-demanding world, many of us get stuck in “go mode.” Stimulating vagus nerve is a natural pathway back to calm, connection, and the ability to meet life with presence instead of overwhelm.Vagus Nerve Yoga offers simple, accessible practices: gentle movement, conscious breathing, meditation, and somatic awareness—to reset the nervous system and invite more ease. With regular practice, these tools help to soothe anxiety, lift fatigue, and support a more grounded sense of self.Think of it as your after-work reset: a shift from high stress to feeling nourished, centered, and back in your natural rhythm.Note: If you have CPTSD or persistent psychosomatic conditions, please consult your physician or MD first.

Class Title: Vinyasa (somatic) IN STUDIO SONNE with Sarah (all levels/english)
Class Description: This 90-minute class weaves together intuitive, organic movement as found in somatic practices (somatic = of the body as felt from within) and more familiar yoga asana flows. The emphasis here is on sensing your own needs in each moment, creating fluidity and spaciousness in your body-mind, and on being present to the full spectrum of your experience as you move. You are invited to let the practice develop a meditative quality, delving deeper into your inner landscape.In the studio, we provide mats and all the props you need to make the most of your practice.
Venue Description: Yoga in Neukölln und Kreuzberg Welcome to yellow yoga! (GER below) We are a “Solidarische Yogagemeinschaft”/ “Community Supported Yoga Project” and you are an important part of it! At the moment, we offer INSTUDIO classes and LIVE drop-in ONLINE classes in both our studios: Studio Sonne (Sonnenallee 67) & Gelber Raum (Mariannenstr. 48). Please note for our IN STUDIO classes: * Arrive at least 15 min before class to have enough time for the check in * You can use our mats/blocs/blankets and don't need to bring your own (but of course you can also use your own) :) Each class is also streamed live via Zoom and you can book them as an ONLINE class. Please note for our ONLINE classes: * You will receive a link to the online class via email 15 minutes before it begins. Please find information about subs and teachers on our website. ------------------------------------------- Willkommen bei yellow yoga! Wir sind eine „Solidarische Yogagemeinschaft“ und du bist ein wichtiger Teil davon! Im Moment bieten wir IN STUDIO Klassen und LIVE Drop-in ONLINE Klassen in beiden Studios an: Studio Sonne (Sonnenallee 67) Gelber Raum (Mariannenstr. 48). Wichtige Infos für unsere IN STUDIO Klassen: * Komme bitte mind. 15 Minuten bevor die Klasse startet ins Studio, um in Ruhe einchecken zu können. * Du kannst unsere Matten/Blöcke/Decken wieder nutzen und must nicht deine eigenen mitbringen (kannst du aber natürlich auch wenn du magst) 😊 Wir streamen alle unsere Klassen auch per Zoom. Um online teilzunehmen kannst du unsere ONLINE Klassen buchen. Wichtige Infos für unsere ONLINE Klassen: * 15 Minuten bevor die Klasse startet erhälst du den Link per Email. Informationen zu Vertretungen und unseren Lehrer*innen findest du auf unserer Homepage.

Class Title: Prenatal Yoga IN STUDIO SONNE with Sarah (all levels/english)
Class Description: Navigating PregnancyIn this class, you will move in a way suited to the pregnant body and learn key points to integrate into your practice. You will build strength (physical & mental) for the upcoming birth and cultivate softness, as well as letting go. You will prepare for the unknown and learn to trust 'what is'. Pregnancy is a precious time full of unexpected changes and challenges. Create a weekly ritual of calm and focus amongst the busy everyday.Open to all levels, no experience needed, from the 2nd trimester of pregnancy.What to expect:*75-minute IN STUDIO session of pregnancy yoga drawing on flowing Hatha as well as restorative and somatic practices*a supportive, warm environment/exchange with other pregnant women*a class taught in English (with German explanations where necessary)In the studio, we provide mats and all the props you need to make the most of your practice.

Class Title: Kundalini Rise IN STUDIO SONNE with Cali (all levels/english)
Class Description: This Kundalini practice weaves stillness and strength into one fused experience. Through longer-held postures, mindful transitions, and steady breath, we cultivate endurance, discipline, and embodied power. We use intentions and visualization to increase our capacity for focus and presence in our everyday life. Within the intensity, we learn to soften the mind and discover the quiet center that remains steady beneath the effort. A practice for building strength that feels rooted, intentional, and deeply transformative

Class Title: Ashtanga IN STUDIO SONNE with Ori (all levels/english)
Class Description: This class follows the traditional Ashtanga method, a dynamic practice linking breath and movement through a fixed set sequence of postures. We’ll typically work through the Half Primary Series, cultivating strength, flexibility, and mental focus through mindful repetition and flowing transitions. While the class is open to all levels, some prior experience with yoga or familiarity with basic postures is recommended, beginners will be guided with modifications, while experienced practitioners can deepen their practice. Expect a good sweat, and the sweet reward of inner peace by the end. In the studio, we provide mats and all the props you need to make the most of your practice.

Class Title: Kundalini IN STUDIO SONNE with Rebecca (all levels/english)
Class Description: A traditional and transformative Kundalini class that meets you where you are. Rebecca’s teaching is powerful, uplifting, and deeply supportive, guiding you to expand your limits, not just physically but mentally. Expect breathwork (including Breath of Fire), movement, and meditation that awaken and challenge you in the best way. All levels welcome, and while familiarity with Breath of Fire can be helpful, it’s absolutely not required.In the studio, we provide mats and all the props you need to make the most of your practice.

Class Description: Ready to get in shape for summer? This dynamic Pilates series is designed to help you feel strong, toned, and confident in your body. Through powerful flows, deep core activation, and targeted sculpting sequences, we’ll build strength where it matters most — from your center outward.Expect strong core work and deep muscle activation, sculpting exercises for arms, legs, and glutes, energizing standing sequences, and dynamic flows that challenge your control and endurance. You’ll feel that signature Pilates burn while improving posture, stability, and overall body tone.This series is about feeling powerful, fit, and energized — not extreme dieting or quick fixes. Just smart, focused training that helps you step into summer feeling your best.All levels are welcome, with options to intensify when you’re ready.
Venue Name: YOU GLOW Studio Mitte - Women only
Venue Description: Welcome to Female Health Yoga in Berlin Mitte Mit unseren Female Health Studios in Mitte und F-Hain begleiten wir dich in jeder Lebensphase als Frau und schaffen einen Raum, in dem Frauengesundheit ohne Tabu gelebt wird. Neben Pilates & Breathwork erwarten dich Hormon Yoga Glow, Vinyasa & Hatha für die Hormon Balance, Core & Pelvic Floor, Zyklus - & Endometriose Yoga, Pre- und Postnatal Yoga, Rückbildung, Fertility Yoga, Yoga für die Wechseljahre & Menopause, Beckenboden Yoga, Female Yin Yoga & Soundbath und weitere spannende Formate. Neben den Yogastunden kannst Du Workshops, Weiterbildungen, Events und Retreats besuchen. Gönn dir eine Auszeit beim Yoga & Wellness Retreat "Mama Takes a Break", unserem Retreat für alle Frauen, die eine Auszeit vom Familienalltag suchen und mit Wellness, Yoga und me-time auftanken möchten. Wann gönnst du dir deinen ersten GLOW? Wir freuen uns auf dich! Bianca & Elisabeth

Reformer Pilates on the Mat brings the signature Reformer techniques, cues, and flow patterns directly onto the mat, using your bodyweight and optional props as sliders to recreate the lengthening, strengthening, and stabilizing effects of the equipment.Expect slow, controlled movements, deep core activation, and targeted muscle work that builds strength, improves posture, and enhances mobility. This class blends the elegance of Reformer sequencing with the accessibility of mat training, making it perfect for all levels.

Class Description: Sacred StillnessTauche ein in einen Raum voller Ruhe, Weichheit und Verbindung. Diese sanfte Yin Yoga & Sound Meditation Session lädt dich ein, ganz in deinem Körper anzukommen, Stress abzubauen und den Tag loszulassen. Sanfte Yin-Yoga-Positionen werden im Sitzen oder Liegen für 3–7 Minuten gehalten und mit vielen Hilfsmitteln unterstützt. So können sich tiefsitzende Verspannungen in den Faszien lösen, die Muskulatur entspannen und dein Energiefluss harmonisieren. Die Beweglichkeit deiner Gelenke verbessert sich, innere Blockaden dürfen gehen, und dein Körper findet zurück in seine natürliche Balance. Die ruhige Yogapraxis hilft dir, Stress abzubauen und stoppt das Gedankenkarussell. Yin Yoga ist ideal, wenn Du einen ruhigen Ausgleich zum stressigen Alltag suchst – und auch wunderbar für Anfängerinnen geeignet.

Class Description: Vinyasa Flow für deine HormonbalanceDiese Stunde kombiniert fließendes Vinyasa Yoga mit Übungen aus dem Hormon Yoga: Fließende Sonnengrüße, Twists, Rückbeugen und Standhaltungen aktivieren deinen Kreislauf, stärken die Muskulatur und erhöhen deine Flexibilität. Akupressur, Pranayama und Energielenkung stimulieren das endokrine System und regen die Produktion der weiblichen Hormone an. Class Description: Strenghten with care! Diese sanfte, aber wirkungsvolle Schwangeren Pilates-Session hilft dir, deinen Körper während der Schwangerschaft zu stärken und gleichzeitig zu entspannen. Mit gezielten Übungen für den Core, sanften Flows und fließenden Übergängen bringst du deinen Kreislauf in Schwung und stärkst deine Muskulatur – alles mit Fokus auf deine Sicherheit und das Wohlbefinden deines Babys. Der Pilatesball und leichte Gewichte unterstützen dich dabei, die Bauchmuskeln zu aktivieren und die Körpermitte zu stabilisieren, während du gleichzeitig den Rücken und den Beckenboden stärkst.Für alle werdenden Mütter, die mit einem sanften Glow und viel Energie durch diese besondere Zeit gehen wollen.

Class Title: Vinyasa IN STUDIO SONNE with Julie (intermediate/english)
Class Description: This class is held IN the studio. The class is also streamed live via Zoom, so if all the spots are fully booked or you just want to take part online, go back to the schedule to book a spot in the ONLINE class. We offer mats, bolsters and blankets in both studios.Arrive as punctually as possible so that there’s no waiting around or last-minute rushing.If you are feeling ill, please stay home.
Venue Description: Yoga in Neukölln und Kreuzberg Welcome to yellow yoga! (GER below) We are a “Solidarische Yogagemeinschaft”/ “Community Supported Yoga Project” and you are an important part of it! At the moment, we offer INSTUDIO classes and LIVE drop-in ONLINE classes in both our studios: Studio Sonne (Sonnenallee 67) & Gelber Raum (Mariannenstr. 48). Please note for our IN STUDIO classes: * Arrive at least 15 min before class to have enough time for the check in * You can use our mats/blocs/blankets and don't need to bring your own (but of course you can also use your own) :) Each class is also streamed live via Zoom and you can book them as an ONLINE class. Please note for our ONLINE classes: * You will receive a link to the online class via email 15 minutes before it begins. Please find information about subs and teachers on our website. ------------------------------------------- Willkommen bei yellow yoga! Wir sind eine „Solidarische Yogagemeinschaft“ und du bist ein wichtiger Teil davon! Im Moment bieten wir IN STUDIO Klassen und LIVE Drop-in ONLINE Klassen in beiden Studios an: Studio Sonne (Sonnenallee 67) Gelber Raum (Mariannenstr. 48). Wichtige Infos für unsere IN STUDIO Klassen: * Komme bitte mind. 15 Minuten bevor die Klasse startet ins Studio, um in Ruhe einchecken zu können. * Du kannst unsere Matten/Blöcke/Decken wieder nutzen und must nicht deine eigenen mitbringen (kannst du aber natürlich auch wenn du magst) 😊 Wir streamen alle unsere Klassen auch per Zoom. Um online teilzunehmen kannst du unsere ONLINE Klassen buchen. Wichtige Infos für unsere ONLINE Klassen: * 15 Minuten bevor die Klasse startet erhälst du den Link per Email. Informationen zu Vertretungen und unseren Lehrer*innen findest du auf unserer Homepage.

Class Title: Vinyasa IN STUDIO SONNE with Detlev (beginner&intermediate/english)
Class Description: Detlev’s classes weave together active and receptive vinyasa yoga with an emphasis on personal and skillful alignment. This style of hatha yoga builds strength, enhances mobility, and brings the body into balance. The practice becomes a vibrant dance of awakening, supported by mindfulness, meditation, and the cultivation of compassion.Each session draws inspiration from both yoga and Buddha-dharma. You are invited to cultivate clarity, observe your mind, soften into openness, welcome inspiration, enjoy the process, and develop a warm, friendly relationship with yourself and others.This steady and strengthening class focuses on one physical and spiritual theme, helping you cultivate both strength and calm. Having a yoga block, blanket, and belt—or anything that can kindly stand in for them—nearby can be helpful.In the studio, we provide mats and all the props you need to make the most of your practice.

Moving together means pushing harder, digging deeper, and unlocking potential we didn’t know we had. The classes are designed to be open-level, giving you the freedom to move at your own pace while still feeling the power of the group around you.

Class Description: Bad Gal Energy 🔥 Own the room, own the bike. A high-intensity ride inspired by Rihanna’s unapologetic power — bold, sexy, and unstoppable! A power-focused ride combining cycling with upper body and core strength work. Venue Description: Yoga, Pilates & more in Berlin Hi! and welcome to our RIDE Studio on Sonnenallee 🪩 This is where music meets movement. Our indoor cycling classes are driven by our coaches' high-energy playlists and include both rhythm-based rides, where movement flows with the beat, and endurance-focused classes designed to build stamina and strength. You're welcome to bring your own gym shoes, or use our cycling shoes available at the studio. The Sonnenallee location is also home to two other Hi! Studios, making it easy to shape your routine: • FLOW – Pilates, Barre, and mindful movement • STRENGTH – mindful strength training for full-body power Whether you're here to ride hard, build endurance, or move with the music, you'll leave feeling clear-headed, energized, and ready to take on the day ✨

Class Description: Morning Glow – Strength & StretchBeginne deinen Tag mit einer belebenden Mischung aus kraftvollem Pilates und wohltuendem Stretching. Der erste Teil der Stunde aktiviert deine Muskulatur, stärkt die Körpermitte und bringt Energie in den ganzen Körper. Im zweiten Teil lösen wir Spannungen mit tiefen Dehnungen und achtsamer Atmung – für mehr Flexibilität, Balance und ein strahlendes Körpergefühl am Morgen.
Venue Name: YOU GLOW Studio Mitte - Women only
Venue Description: Welcome to Female Health Yoga in Berlin Mitte Mit unseren Female Health Studios in Mitte und F-Hain begleiten wir dich in jeder Lebensphase als Frau und schaffen einen Raum, in dem Frauengesundheit ohne Tabu gelebt wird. Neben Pilates & Breathwork erwarten dich Hormon Yoga Glow, Vinyasa & Hatha für die Hormon Balance, Core & Pelvic Floor, Zyklus - & Endometriose Yoga, Pre- und Postnatal Yoga, Rückbildung, Fertility Yoga, Yoga für die Wechseljahre & Menopause, Beckenboden Yoga, Female Yin Yoga & Soundbath und weitere spannende Formate. Neben den Yogastunden kannst Du Workshops, Weiterbildungen, Events und Retreats besuchen. Gönn dir eine Auszeit beim Yoga & Wellness Retreat "Mama Takes a Break", unserem Retreat für alle Frauen, die eine Auszeit vom Familienalltag suchen und mit Wellness, Yoga und me-time auftanken möchten. Wann gönnst du dir deinen ersten GLOW? Wir freuen uns auf dich! Bianca & Elisabeth

Class Description: Sacred StillnessTauche ein in einen Raum voller Ruhe, Weichheit und Verbindung. Diese sanfte Yin Yoga & Sound Meditation Session lädt dich ein, ganz in deinem Körper anzukommen, Stress abzubauen und den Tag loszulassen. Sanfte Yin-Yoga-Positionen werden im Sitzen oder Liegen für 3–7 Minuten gehalten und mit vielen Hilfsmitteln unterstützt. So können sich tiefsitzende Verspannungen in den Faszien lösen, die Muskulatur entspannen und dein Energiefluss harmonisieren. Die Beweglichkeit deiner Gelenke verbessert sich, innere Blockaden dürfen gehen, und dein Körper findet zurück in seine natürliche Balance. Die ruhige Yogapraxis hilft dir, Stress abzubauen und stoppt das Gedankenkarussell. Yin Yoga ist ideal, wenn Du einen ruhigen Ausgleich zum stressigen Alltag suchst – und auch wunderbar für Anfängerinnen geeignet.

Class Description: Strenghten with care! Diese sanfte, aber wirkungsvolle Schwangeren Pilates-Session hilft dir, deinen Körper während der Schwangerschaft zu stärken und gleichzeitig zu entspannen. Mit gezielten Übungen für den Core, sanften Flows und fließenden Übergängen bringst du deinen Kreislauf in Schwung und stärkst deine Muskulatur – alles mit Fokus auf deine Sicherheit und das Wohlbefinden deines Babys. Der Pilatesball und leichte Gewichte unterstützen dich dabei, die Bauchmuskeln zu aktivieren und die Körpermitte zu stabilisieren, während du gleichzeitig den Rücken und den Beckenboden stärkst.Für alle werdenden Mütter, die mit einem sanften Glow und viel Energie durch diese besondere Zeit gehen wollen.

Class Title: Ashtanga IN STUDIO SONNE with Ori (all levels/english)
Class Description: This class is held IN the studio. The class is also streamed live via Zoom, so if all the spots are fully booked or you just want to take part online, go back to the schedule to book a spot in the ONLINE class. We offer mats, bolsters and blankets in both studios.Arrive as punctually as possible so that there’s no waiting around or last-minute rushing.If you are feeling ill, please stay home.
Venue Description: Yoga in Neukölln und Kreuzberg Welcome to yellow yoga! (GER below) We are a “Solidarische Yogagemeinschaft”/ “Community Supported Yoga Project” and you are an important part of it! At the moment, we offer INSTUDIO classes and LIVE drop-in ONLINE classes in both our studios: Studio Sonne (Sonnenallee 67) & Gelber Raum (Mariannenstr. 48). Please note for our IN STUDIO classes: * Arrive at least 15 min before class to have enough time for the check in * You can use our mats/blocs/blankets and don't need to bring your own (but of course you can also use your own) :) Each class is also streamed live via Zoom and you can book them as an ONLINE class. Please note for our ONLINE classes: * You will receive a link to the online class via email 15 minutes before it begins. Please find information about subs and teachers on our website. ------------------------------------------- Willkommen bei yellow yoga! Wir sind eine „Solidarische Yogagemeinschaft“ und du bist ein wichtiger Teil davon! Im Moment bieten wir IN STUDIO Klassen und LIVE Drop-in ONLINE Klassen in beiden Studios an: Studio Sonne (Sonnenallee 67) Gelber Raum (Mariannenstr. 48). Wichtige Infos für unsere IN STUDIO Klassen: * Komme bitte mind. 15 Minuten bevor die Klasse startet ins Studio, um in Ruhe einchecken zu können. * Du kannst unsere Matten/Blöcke/Decken wieder nutzen und must nicht deine eigenen mitbringen (kannst du aber natürlich auch wenn du magst) 😊 Wir streamen alle unsere Klassen auch per Zoom. Um online teilzunehmen kannst du unsere ONLINE Klassen buchen. Wichtige Infos für unsere ONLINE Klassen: * 15 Minuten bevor die Klasse startet erhälst du den Link per Email. Informationen zu Vertretungen und unseren Lehrer*innen findest du auf unserer Homepage.

Class Title: Postnatal Yoga + Baby IN STUDIO SONNE with Shirin (all levels/english)
Class Description: This postnatal yoga class is designed for new mothers who wish to reconnect with their bodies after giving birth. The gentle yoga practice supports your recovery, helps your body’s natural healing process, and guides you to regain strength and a sense of grounding. Together, we’ll mindfully strengthen the pelvic floor and abdominal muscles in a safe, structured way. We’ll also focus on supporting your back and legs to create more stability, ease, and fresh energy for everyday life with your baby. The class is thoughtfully designed and no previous yoga experience is needed. Your baby is warmly welcome to join you in class. Whether your little one is sleeping, feeding, observing, or exploring the room – everything is perfectly fine. The atmosphere is relaxed and understanding, allowing you to pause, care for your baby, and continue in your own rhythm whenever you’re ready. You can start postnatal yoga from around 8 weeks after birth, alongside your recovery program or anytime afterward

Class Title: Yin Yoga, Yoga Nidra & Meditation IN STUDIO SONNE with Victoria (all levels/english)
Class Description: This class is an invitation to slow down and rest deeply, especially supportive during the winter season, when our bodies naturally crave more inwardness, softness, and ease. Through long-held yin postures, we create space for the body to release tension and settle. The practice gradually moves toward stillness, allowing the nervous system to downshift and conserve energy rather than push or stimulate. The class then transitions into Yoga Nidra, a guided practice of profound rest. Lying down comfortably, awareness is gently guided inward, supporting nervous system regulation and accessing states of rest that are often deeper than sleep. Meditation and extended savasana allow time for integration, helping the effects of the practice settle fully into the body. This class is especially nourishing if you’re feeling tired, overwhelmed, or in need of deeper rest. It offers a space to meet the body where it is, honor your capacity, and reconnect with natural rhythms of slowing down.In the studio, we provide mats and all the props you need to make the most of your practice.

The practice gradually moves toward stillness, allowing the nervous system to downshift and conserve energy rather than push or stimulate. The class then transitions into Yoga Nidra, a guided practice of profound rest. Lying down comfortably, awareness is gently guided inward, supporting nervous system regulation and accessing states of rest that are often deeper than sleep. Meditation and extended savasana allow time for integration, helping the effects of the practice settle fully into the body. This class is especially nourishing if you’re feeling tired, overwhelmed, or in need of deeper rest. It offers a space to meet the body where it is, honor your capacity, and reconnect with natural rhythms of slowing down.In the studio, we provide mats and all the props you need to make the most of your practice. - Venue: Yellow Yoga - Studio Sonne (4.9) - Disciplines: Yoga - Address: Sonnenallee 67, 12045 Berlin - Venue Description: Yoga in Neukölln und Kreuzberg Welcome to yellow yoga! Class Description: Pilates Glow – strenghten your core! Diese energiegeladene Pilates-Session bringt dich in Bewegung und schenkt dir den Kickstart, den dein Tag verdient. Mit aktivierenden Flows, gezieltem Core-Training und fließenden Übergängen stärkst du deine Muskulatur, bringst deinen Kreislauf in Schwung und tankst neue Energie. Pilatesball und Gewichte helfen dir, die Bauchmuskeln zu aktivieren und deinen Körper von innen heraus zu stärken. Für mehr Stabilität, Leichtigkeit und ein starkes Körpergefühl von innen heraus.Perfekt für alle, die mit einem frischen GLOW durchstarten wollen.

Class Title: Schwangeren Feelgood Yoga with Oils & Soundbath
Class Description: Feelgood Yoga in der SchwangerschaftUnser Pränatal Yoga ist perfekt abgestimmt auf deine Schwangerschaft und schenkt dir Entspannung, Kraft und eine liebevolle Geburtsvorbereitung. Sanfte Dehnungen lösen Verspannungen, lindern Rückenschmerzen und schenken deinem Körper mehr Flexibilität. Kräftigende Übungen stärken deine Muskulatur, denn für die Geburt brauchst du Ausdauer und Kraft. Atemtechniken, Meditation und Beckenbodentraining helfen dir zu entspannen, können Ängste vor der Geburt abbauen und bereiten dich mit Vertrauen auf dieses besondere Ereignis vor.Gönn dir eine bewusste Auszeit und verbinde dich liebevoll mit deinem Baby – egal in welchem Trimester und auch als Yoga-Anfängerin.

Class Description: Release & RestoreMyofascial Release Yoga verbindet ruhige Yogapositionen mit gezieltem Druck auf dein Fasziengewebe – mithilfe von Bällen, Blöcken oder sanften Bewegungen. So können Verklebungen und Spannungen gelöst werden und dein Körper wird wieder freier und geschmeidiger. Durch das Arbeiten mit Triggerpunkten, kleinen Bewegungen und achtsamer Atmung erreichst du tiefere Gewebeschichten, förderst die Durchblutung und unterstützt deine natürliche Regeneration.Diese Stunde lädt dich ein, tief loszulassen – körperlich wie emotional. Für alle, die sich wieder mehr Raum im Körper wünschen.

Class Category: Fitness, Pilates, Yoga, Indoor Cycling, Functional Training, Online Course, Barre
Class Description: This music-driven cycling class keeps you moving with energizing house beats and a party-like atmosphere 🚴 Bring a friend for free and ride together! Join this high-energy ride class and share the fun — your guest rides for free. Just book your spot and bring someone along! This class is taught in German 🇩🇪
Venue Description: Yoga, Pilates & more in Berlin Hi! and welcome to our RIDE Studio on Sonnenallee 🪩 This is where music meets movement. Our indoor cycling classes are driven by our coaches' high-energy playlists and include both rhythm-based rides, where movement flows with the beat, and endurance-focused classes designed to build stamina and strength. You're welcome to bring your own gym shoes, or use our cycling shoes available at the studio. The Sonnenallee location is also home to two other Hi! Studios, making it easy to shape your routine: • FLOW – Pilates, Barre, and mindful movement • STRENGTH – mindful strength training for full-body power Whether you're here to ride hard, build endurance, or move with the music, you'll leave feeling clear-headed, energized, and ready to take on the day ✨

You're welcome to bring your own gym shoes, or use our cycling shoes available at the studio. The Sonnenallee location is also home to two other Hi! Studios, making it easy to shape your routine: • FLOW – Pilates, Barre, and mindful movement • STRENGTH – mindful strength training for full-body power Whether you're here to ride hard, build endurance, or move with the music, you'll leave feeling clear-headed, energized, and ready to take on the day ✨

Class Description: Feelgood Yoga in der SchwangerschaftUnser Pränatal Yoga ist perfekt abgestimmt auf deine Schwangerschaft und schenkt dir Entspannung, Kraft und eine liebevolle Geburtsvorbereitung. Sanfte Dehnungen lösen Verspannungen, lindern Rückenschmerzen und schenken deinem Körper mehr Flexibilität. Kräftigende Übungen stärken deine Muskulatur, denn für die Geburt brauchst du Ausdauer und Kraft. Atemtechniken, Meditation und Beckenbodentraining helfen dir zu entspannen, können Ängste vor der Geburt abbauen und bereiten dich mit Vertrauen auf dieses besondere Ereignis vor.Gönn dir eine bewusste Auszeit und verbinde dich liebevoll mit deinem Baby – egal in welchem Trimester und auch als Yoga-Anfängerin.

Class Description: Hard Core Pilates is an intense and challenging core focused class that blends Pilates with strength. It will target your deepest muscles and give you a boost of energy.Previous Pilates experience is recommended.
Venue Description: pilates, strength, circuit training, endurance pilates + strength pilates + strength pilates + strength Our high-intensity workouts are designed to move your blood, make you sweat, and build real strength, but always in a way that feels right for you. Moving together means pushing harder, digging deeper, and unlocking potential we didn’t know we had. The classes are designed to be open-level, giving you the freedom to move at your own pace while still feeling the power of the group around you.

Class Description: Around 8-12 weeks after giving birth, you can join Postnatal Yoga, with or without your baby. Through structured sequences, you'll rebuild muscle tone, improve stability, and regain control over your muscles. Focus is on strengthening the pelvic floor, abdomen, and shoulders. A typical class not only supports physical recovery but also provides balance and relaxation amidst your new routine as a mother. If you wish, you can learn how to incorporate your baby into the exercises. This class doesn’t replace a postpartum recovery course led by a midwife!

Class Title: DEEP DIVE GONG 🌬️ 90min restorative sound experience
Class Category: Fitness, Pilates, Yoga, Dancing, Massage, Meditation, Wellness, Qi Gong and Tai Chi, Relaxation, Online Course
Class Description: A 90-minute immersive sound journey for deep relaxation, stress release and nervous system reset.This session begins with a short introduction to sound and its effect on the body, followed by a guided breath journey to help you arrive fully and let go of mental tension.The main part of the experience is a powerful gong sound bath, allowing the vibrations to move through the body, calm the nervous system and create a state of deep rest. You may drift, sleep, or simply listen — there is nothing you need to do.To support integration, each participant receives a short one-on-one tuning fork application, helping the body absorb and ground the experience.This session is suitable for beginners and experienced participants alike.No prior experience is needed.

Class Title: Vinyasa IN STUDIO SONNE with Carolina (intermediate/english)
Class Description: IN STUDIO: This class is held LIVE IN THE STUDIO! If you would rather practice online or the class is fully booked, please go back to the schedule and book a spot in the online class.· We offer mats, bolsters and blankets.· The doors of the studio are closed punctually, so please arrive at least 15 minutes before the start of the class, so that you have time to check in and get ready.See you soon on the mat!
Venue Description: Yoga in Neukölln und Kreuzberg Welcome to yellow yoga! (GER below) We are a “Solidarische Yogagemeinschaft”/ “Community Supported Yoga Project” and you are an important part of it! At the moment, we offer INSTUDIO classes and LIVE drop-in ONLINE classes in both our studios: Studio Sonne (Sonnenallee 67) & Gelber Raum (Mariannenstr. 48). Please note for our IN STUDIO classes: * Arrive at least 15 min before class to have enough time for the check in * You can use our mats/blocs/blankets and don't need to bring your own (but of course you can also use your own) :) Each class is also streamed live via Zoom and you can book them as an ONLINE class. Class Title: Ashtanga IN STUDIO SONNE with Ori (all levels/english)
Class Description: This class follows the traditional Ashtanga method, a dynamic practice linking breath and movement through a fixed set sequence of postures. We’ll typically work through the Half Primary Series, cultivating strength, flexibility, and mental focus through mindful repetition and flowing transitions. While the class is open to all levels, some prior experience with yoga or familiarity with basic postures is recommended, beginners will be guided with modifications, while experienced practitioners can deepen their practice. Expect a good sweat, and the sweet reward of inner peace by the end. In the studio, we provide mats and all the props you need to make the most of your practice.

Class Title: Vinyasa IN STUDIO SONNE with Valerie (beginners/english)
Class Description: Active yet slow mindful class. The class is a back to basics suitable for those starting yoga, and those revisiting the foundations of poses, with clear explanations of biomechanics and what to feel where. It incorporates warm ups from other disciplines like nervous system regulation, somatics and Feldenkrais to help focus the mind in the here and now, and release stress. Perfect for beginners, as well as those returning to yoga after a long break, an injury, surgery, or pregnancy. In the studio, we provide mats and all the props you need to make the most of your practice.

Please note for our IN STUDIO classes: * Arrive at least 15 min before class to have enough time for the check in * You can use our mats/blocs/blankets and don't need to bring your own (but of course you can also use your own) :) Each class is also streamed live via Zoom and you can book them as an ONLINE class. Please note for our ONLINE classes: * You will receive a link to the online class via email 15 minutes before it begins. Please find information about subs and teachers on our website. ------------------------------------------- Willkommen bei yellow yoga! Wir sind eine „Solidarische Yogagemeinschaft“ und du bist ein wichtiger Teil davon! Im Moment bieten wir IN STUDIO Klassen und LIVE Drop-in ONLINE Klassen in beiden Studios an: Studio Sonne (Sonnenallee 67) Gelber Raum (Mariannenstr. 48). Wichtige Infos für unsere IN STUDIO Klassen: * Komme bitte mind. 15 Minuten bevor die Klasse startet ins Studio, um in Ruhe einchecken zu können. * Du kannst unsere Matten/Blöcke/Decken wieder nutzen und must nicht deine eigenen mitbringen (kannst du aber natürlich auch wenn du magst) 😊 Wir streamen alle unsere Klassen auch per Zoom. Um online teilzunehmen kannst du unsere ONLINE Klassen buchen. Wichtige Infos für unsere ONLINE Klassen: * 15 Minuten bevor die Klasse startet erhälst du den Link per Email. Informationen zu Vertretungen und unseren Lehrer*innen findest du auf unserer Homepage.
